issues.title: Add support for device Tuya ZG-101Z_D_1

prs.title: Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202 / "_TZ3000_c8ozah8n"

aiSummary:
## GitHub Activity Summary — Universal Tuya Zigbee (v7.5.x)

### 🔴 New Device Requests (Action Needed)

| Issue | Device | FP | Status |
|-------|--------|----|--------|
| [#318](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/318) | PJ-1203A (energy meter) | `_TZE204_81yrt3l` | **Open** — Incorrect measurement values. New FP variant alongside existing `_TZE204_81yrt3lo` (`din_rail_meter`). Likely needs DP mapping review or divisor fix for power/energy registers. Users on v5.11.25+ should re-pair and submit diagnostics. |
| [#319](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/319) | ZG-101Z_D_1 | `_TZ3000_402vrq2i` | **Open** — FP already exists in `smart_knob`. Probable mispairing; user may need to force correct driver or FP needs reassignment to a dedicated driver. |

### ✅ Already Supported (No Action)

| Issue | FP | Driver | Note |
|-------|----|--------|------|
| [#316](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/316) | `_TZ3000_fllyghyj` | `climate_sensor` | Closed — wrong-device recognition resolved via re-pair. |
| [#1395](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1395) | `_TZ3000_hyarhbyx` | `switch_1gang` | Already in fingerprint DB. Duplicate request. |

### 🔀 Open PRs — Candidate FPs for Integration

| PR | FPs | Description | Action |
|----|-----|-------------|--------|
| [#1372](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1372) | `_TZE200_mgxy2d9f` | Motion sensor (TS0202 variant) | Review + merge into main |
| [#1350](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350) | `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab` | TS110E driver (new driver) | Needs testing — new driver category |
| [#1253](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253) | `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p` + 1 unnamed | 3 new devices | Verify FPs against existing drivers |
| [#1219](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219) | `_TZ3000_gjrubzje` | `driver.compose.json` update | FP addition — review target driver |
| [#1218](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218) | `_TZE204_dapwryy7` | `driver.compose.json` update | FP addition — verify DP compatibility |
| [#1166](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166) | `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n` | PIR sensor (TS0202) | Closed but **not merged** — needs rework for sleepy-device passive DP listener. |

### 📋 Recommended Next Steps

1. **#318 (PJ-1203A)**: Compare DP table between `_TZE204_81yrt3l` and `_TZE204_81yrt3lo`. If DPs differ, add as separate FP or adjust divisor in `din_rail_meter` device.js.
2. **#1350 (TS110E)**: New driver — requires `driver.compose.json`, `driver.js`, `device.js`, flow cards, and asset images before merge.
3. **#1166 (PIR)**: Re-evaluate against v5.11.170+ passive DP listener fix for sleepy TS0202 devices.
4. **Fork FPs (#1219, #1218, #1253)**: Validate each FP against `DeviceFingerprintDB.js` to avoid cross-driver collisions before merging to main.

---
*Auto-generated from GitHub activity scan. Review and merge candidates via GitHub Actions workflow.*
